message:
perf(join): Add prefetch hints in gather loop to reduce cache misses

Add @prefetch intrinsic to hint CPU about upcoming memory accesses
during the gather operation. This reduces L1/L2 cache misses when
gathering scattered row indices.

Prefetch distance of 8 elements allows CPU to start fetching the
next memory locations while processing current ones.

Benchmark results (5 runs):
  LanceQL: 373K-393K rows/sec (avg ~384K)
  Polars:  391K-392K rows/sec (avg ~391K)
  Gap reduced from 7% to ~2%, LanceQL matches/beats Polars in best runs
